authorization.opened_by: explicit user direction after the WuciOS v2.4 Phase 3C closeout

runtime_contract.password_model: all human and root password hashes locked; local live-console autologin only
runtime_contract.firewall: nftables input, forward, and output default-drop with loopback-only accept rules

publication_holds: clean release-source commit and annotated tag
non_claims: The network policy is not a general runtime sandbox or OS containment claim.
The live console trust model is not an installed-system credential model.
Classical signatures and hashes do not establish quantum safety.
Internal readiness is not production authority and does not grant publish, trust, or certification authority.
